speaker: speaker1
text: Allan , I am really disappointed by your lack of effort on this project .

speaker: speaker2
text: Look , Sally . I ’ Ve put just as much work into this as anybody else .

speaker: speaker1
text: No , I ’ m sorry . I disagree . I don ’ t think you ’ Ve been working at full speed at all .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well . I ’ m sorry you feel that way .
